user.title: Add a 7Port
user.description: Enter the connection details of your ControlArt 7Port.

error.cannot_connect: Could not open a TCP connection to the 7Port. Check the IP address and port.

user.title: Device type
user.description: Choose the type of device to control through this 7Port.

brand.title: Brand
brand.description: Pick the brand of the appliance, or create a new device definition.

model.title: Model
model.description: Pick a {brand} model, or create a new one.

new_meta.title: New device definition
new_meta.description: Describe the appliance. The codes will be collected in the next step.

new_codes.title: Paste the captured codes

new_meta_tv.title: New TV definition
new_meta_tv.description: Enter the brand and model of the TV.

new_codes_tv.title: Paste the IR codes

new_meta_cover.title: New cover definition
new_meta_cover.description: Enter the brand and model of the curtain/blind.

new_codes_cover.title: Paste the codes
new_codes_cover.description:
Paste one code per line. `open` and `close` are required; `stop` is optional.

Accepts IR (`sendir,...`) and RF (`sendrf,...` / `sendrf_rc,...`).

Example:
{example}

data.name: Name
data.ir_port: 7Port IR output (1-7, or 8 = internal Blaster; ignored for RF codes)
data.window_sensor: Window sensor (blocks closing when window is open)

data.name: Name
data.ir_port: 7Port IR output (1-7, or 8 = internal Blaster; ignored for RF codes)
data.window_sensor: Window sensor (blocks closing when window is open)

error.temp_range: Minimum temperature cannot be greater than the maximum.
error.no_fan_modes: Select at least one fan speed.
error.parse_errors: Some lines could not be read. Check the format `name: code`.
error.no_states: No state codes were recognized. Use names like `Temp-auto22`.

abort.unknown_device: The device definition could not be found.

options.stateful: The state code already turns the unit on
options.explicit_on: Send a 'power on' code before the state

options.never: Do not control the display light
options.once: Turn off once when powering on (unit remembers the state)
options.always: Turn off after every command (unit resets light on each command)
